name: Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until fluffy.
2. Add the egg and molasses; beat well.
3. Combine the dry ingredients and add to the creamed mixture; mix well.
4. Chill the dough.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls and roll in granulated sugar.
6. Place the cookies 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes.
8. Makes 4 dozen snappy cookies.
